lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Norman
lines.text: Quickly, tell me - is it still there?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is what still where?

lines.speaker: Norman
lines.text: The THING, the THING! It was just outside my house! Has it gone away yet? Or is it still lurking out there, waiting for me to go outside?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I didn't see any THING out there, just a couple of guards. What did it look like?

lines.speaker: Norman
lines.text: Ohhhh, it was HORRIBLE! It was an enormous THING, with TEETH and EYES and... and... and THINGS!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Um... would you care to be more specific?

lines.speaker: Norman
lines.text: I can't. I only saw it in the dark.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You only saw this THING in the dark?

lines.speaker: Norman
lines.text: I was sleeping peacefully one night, when suddenly I woke up and saw it through the window. It was LOOKING at me! I haven't dared go out since then. It's had me trapped in here for days! I've packed my

lines.speaker: Norman
lines.text: bags so I can escape, but the THING's still out there waiting for me to come out! If I have to stay in here much longer I'll go mad! MAD!! MAD!!!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There's no THING outside. Just come out and get some fresh air before you go funny in the head.

lines.speaker: Norman
lines.text: You want me to go outside?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think you might just have dreamed about the THING.

lines.speaker: Norman
lines.text: You want me to believe that it's not real?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Please come outside!

lines.speaker: Norman
lines.text: No! No! I know what you are! You're in league with the THING! It keeps sending people in here to trick me into going outside! They keep stealing from me too! GO AWAY!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not trying to trick you!

lines.speaker: Norman
lines.text: Get thee gone, trickster!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sheesh...

sections.title: When the Party Room chest contains more than 50,000 or 76,000 coins in Grand Exchange value (on a F2P or members' world respectively)

lines.speaker: Norman
lines.text: Party! Party!

lines.speaker: Norman
lines.text: Something's happening in the party room!

lines.speaker: Norman
lines.text: Everyone get to the party room!

lines.speaker: Norman
lines.text: What's happening in the party room?

lines.speaker: Norman
lines.text: Someone's having a big party!

lines.speaker: Norman
lines.text: Get to the party room NOW!

lines.speaker: Norman
lines.text: Get to the party room!

lines.speaker: Norman
lines.text: Get to the party room quick!

lines.speaker: Norman
lines.text: Big value items in the party room now!

lines.speaker: Norman
lines.text: Quick! Get to the party room!
